label: YouTube — Video Platform Browser
description: Extracted from: ScrapeClaw youtube-scraper, scrapfly.io YouTube guides, generic video site scrapers. Verified 2026-07-16: #comments null before scroll, loads after scroll. 700px trigger confirmed.
source_patterns: Video page: scroll down to trigger comments section (lazy-loaded — major pattern)
Comments: scroll to bottom of video section → 2-3s for comments to load → scroll comments
Search: type query → 2-4s → scroll results → click video
Sidebar: click suggested video → 1-2s load → scroll to push comments down again

scroll.description: Key pattern: MUST scroll past video player to trigger comment lazy-load. Source: scrapfly
scroll.scroll_strategy: incremental — first pass to trigger comments, second to read them

mouse.description: Moderate — video player interaction is simple click targets

comment_section.description: Comments are lazy-loaded when scrolled into view. Must scroll below video player.
comment_section.strategy: scroll down 600-800px → wait 2-3s → comments render → scroll through comments

platform_specific.sequence_hint: search → scroll results → click video → watch/intro pause (3-8s) → scroll down to comments (pause) → scroll comments → click show more on description → click suggested video → repeat
